title: taraxacum uncosum
intro: Taraxacum uncosum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, primarily used for its bitter compounds and inulin content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which may aid in digestion and liver health. Taraxacum uncosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies and supplements.
